---
title: "Quadrant Chart"
output: html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)
library(showtext)   # custom fonts
library(ragg)       # crisp text rendering when saving

# Pull in a clean, professional Google font
font_add_google("Manrope", "manrope")
showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 300)
```

# Read in data
```{r}
product <- read.csv("digital_product_enhancements.csv")
colnames(product)
```

# Plot
```{r}
palette <- c(
  "Checkout"   = "#f2a679",
  "Navigation" = "#8fe0a0",
  "Loyalty"    = "#7fc9f0",
  "Security"   = "#d38fe8"
)

darken <- function(hex, factor = 0.6) {
  rgb_vals <- grDevices::col2rgb(hex) * factor
  grDevices::rgb(rgb_vals[1, ], rgb_vals[2, ], rgb_vals[3, ], maxColorValue = 255)
}

label_palette <- setNames(darken(palette, factor = 1), names(palette))

bg_color      <- "#0b0b12"  
panel_color   <- "#1c1c2b"  
grid_color    <- "#3a3a52"  
text_color    <- "#f2f2f5"
subtext_color <- "#a9a9bd"

quad <- product |>
  ggplot(aes(x = engineering_effort, y = impact_score)) +
  # --- Quadrant background shading
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = 0, 
           xmax = 5, 
           ymin = 5, 
           ymax = 10,
           fill = "#ffffff", 
           alpha = 0.1) +   # Quick Wins
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = 5, 
           xmax = 10,
           ymin = 5, 
           ymax = 10,
           fill = "#ffffff", 
           alpha = 0.15) +    # Major Projects
    annotate("rect", 
           xmin = 0, 
           xmax = 5,
           ymin = 0, 
           ymax = 5,
           fill = "#ffffff", 
           alpha = 0.2) +    # Fill-Ins
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = 5, 
           xmax = 10,
           ymin = 0,
           ymax = 5,
           fill = "#ffffff", 
           alpha = 0.25) +    # Reassess
  # --- Quadrant labels ---
  annotate("text", 
           x = 0.3, 
           y = 9.6, 
           label = "QUICK WINS",
           hjust = 0, 
           color = subtext_color, 
           family = "manrope",
           size = 3.4, 
           fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", 
           x = 9.7, 
           y = 9.6, 
           label = "MAJOR PROJECTS",
           hjust = 1, 
           color = subtext_color, 
           family = "manrope",
           size = 3.4, 
           fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", 
           x = 0.3, 
           y = 0.5, 
           label = "FILL-INS",
           hjust = 0, 
           color = subtext_color, 
           family = "manrope",
           size = 3.4, 
           fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", 
           x = 9.7, 
           y = 0.5, 
           label = "REASSESS",
           hjust = 1, 
           color = subtext_color, 
           family = "manrope",
           size = 3.4, 
           fontface = "bold") +
  # --- Quadrant divider lines ---
  geom_hline(yintercept = 5, color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 5, color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.6) +
  # --- Data points with a white stroke so they lift off the dark bg ---
  geom_point(aes(size = design_effort, 
                 fill = category),
             shape = 21, 
             color = "#ffffff", 
             stroke = 0.4, 
             alpha = 0.7,
             ) +
  # --- Labels with cleaner repel behavior ---
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = project_name, color = category),
    family = "manrope", 
    fontface = "bold", 
    size = 1.5,
    segment.color = subtext_color, 
    segment.size = 0.3,
    box.padding = 0.6, 
    point.padding = 2,
    max.overlaps = Inf, 
    show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), 
                     breaks = seq(0, 10, 2),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), 
                     breaks = seq(0, 10, 2),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Design Effort", 
                        range = c(3, 16),
                        breaks = c(2, 5, 8)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = label_palette, 
                     guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette,
                    name = "Project Category") +
  guides(
    size = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(fill = subtext_color, color = "white"),
      order = 1
    ),
    fill = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(size = 5, color = "white"),
      order = 2
    )
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Effort vs. Impact: Roadmap Prioritization",
    subtitle = "Bubble size = design effort  ·  Color = project category",
    x = "Engineering Effort",
    y = "Impact Score",
    caption = "Effort and impact are directional estimates from early-stage roadmap discussions, not modeled outputs.",
    color = "Category: "
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_family = "manrope") +
  theme(
    plot.background   = element_rect(fill = bg_color, color = NA),
    panel.background  = element_rect(fill = panel_color, color = NA),
    panel.border      = element_rect(color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.6, fill = NA),
    panel.grid.major  = element_line(color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.25, linetype = "dotted"),
    panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),

    plot.title    = element_text(color = text_color, face = "bold", size = 20, margin = margin(b = 4)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = subtext_color, size = 12, margin = margin(b = 14)),
    plot.caption  = element_text(color = subtext_color, size = 8.5, hjust = 0, margin = margin(t = 12)),

    axis.title = element_text(color = subtext_color, size = 11),
    axis.text  = element_text(color = subtext_color, size = 9),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),

    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.background  = element_rect(fill = bg_color, color = NA),
    legend.key         = element_rect(fill = panel_color, color = NA),
    legend.title       = element_text(color = text_color, size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text        = element_text(color = text_color, size = 10),
    legend.box         = "vertical",

    plot.margin = margin(t = 20, r = 24, b = 16, l = 20)
  )

quad
```

# Save at high resolution
```{r}
ggsave(
  "quadrant_chart_image.png",
  plot = quad,
  width = 15, height = 10, dpi = 120,
  device = ragg::agg_png
)
```
